name: J23 JC23 - Open-Back Inclinable Power Press
description: A versatile and reliable open-back inclinable power press series, ideal for a wide range of metal forming applications such as punching, blanking, bending, and shallow drawing operations. The robust cast iron frame ensures stability and performance, while the inclinable design facilitates efficient scrap removal.
features: Inclinable frame for easy scrap discharge
Precision machining and adjustable ram stroke
Reliable turn-key clutch and brake system

name: MECC Y2/Y23 Series Three-Phase Asynchronous Motor
description: MECC Y2/Y23 Series IEC-frame three-phase asynchronous squirrel-cage motors designed for reliable S1 continuous duty, offering multiple pole options (2/4/6/8/10) and 50/60 Hz operation. Rugged cast-iron construction, precision-balanced rotors, and standardized IEC dimensions support easy installation and maintenance across a wide range of industrial applications.
features: Cast-iron housing with high mechanical strength
Precision-balanced rotor for smooth, low-noise operation
Wide frame coverage (63–355) and 0.12–315 kW range
Multiple mountings: B3 (foot), B5 (flange), B35 (foot + flange)
IP55 protection and Class F insulation (typical)
High starting torque with good overload capacity
applications: Fans and blowers for ventilation and air handling
Mixers, crushers, grinders, and machine tools

name: T2W3-N Series Brushless Synchronous Alternator
description: Brushless three-phase synchronous alternators (new series) with WT-2 AVR. 400V, 3-phase, 4-wire. Stable voltage, low distortion, and fast transient recovery across models 20–900.

name: T2W3 Series Synchronous Alternator
description: T2W3 series three-phase, 3-wire star-connected synchronous alternators with WT-2 AVR. Rated voltage 400V, 50Hz, 1500rpm, power factor 0.8 (lagging). Designed to GB/T765 standards with compact mounting options (IMB34/IMB3) and damper windings for reliable performance.
features: Stable output with low waveform distortion

name: TZH-N 184 Land Use Alternator
description: TZH-N 184 land-use brushless synchronous alternators with AVR. Rated for 40°C ambient and up to 1000 m altitude. Supports 120–600 V, 50/60 Hz, single- or three-phase operation, continuous duty (H=125°C/40°C).
features: AS440 AVR + three-phase induction detection module ±0.5% regulation (optional)
applications: Prime/standby power for industry and construction
Remote sites and mobile power trailers

name: Synchronous Alternator Series TZH-N
description: The TZH-N series synchronous alternators from Lanzhou Electric deliver high-performance, stable power output, and robust mechanical integrity. Designed for diesel-generator systems and industrial-grade reliability.

description: TZH three-phase synchronous alternators with static excitation and self-excited constant voltage. Widely used with diesel engines for general-purpose and standby/emergency generator sets.

name: UCW Series Brushless Synchronous Alternator
description: The UCW Series Brushless Synchronous Alternators deliver high-efficiency performance and steady power output across industrial and commercial applications. Designed for either 1500rpm or 1000rpm operation, the series spans a wide range of kVA ratings and frame sizes.
